description: Impala is a travel technology company that helps room sellers and hotels distribute and book hotel inventory. Its platform supports hotel content, rates, availability, bookings, deals, and related travel distribution workflows.
summary: Impala exposes one documented HTTP API for hotel booking and inventory at `https://api.impala.travel/v1`, authenticated with an Impala-issued API key; no public GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surfaces were found.
